name: @revheat/platform-access
//scripts: Named 'compile' NOT 'build' on purpose: pacote treats a 'build' (or prepare/install/prepack) script as a trigger to run `npm install` inside the git-dep clone, which pulls this package's devDeps and crashes arborist. dist/ is committed, so consumers never build. After editing src/, run `npm run compile` and commit dist/.
